items.title: [负面] Morimens has fantastic visuals, sounds, and storyl...
items.summary:
Morimens has fantastic visuals, sounds, and storylines but it's tied to an awful monetization model which keeps getting worse.

As a big spender in this game (hundreds in the last 3 months, those FOMO packs are dangerous) I can't in good faith recommend Morimens. Which hurts and is embarrassing, as I was championing Morimens to everyone I knew.

"It's not like other gacha, it's actually good!"

"Yeah the monetization model sucks, but there's much worse out there and there's nothing else like Morimens!"

That stopped today.

BIAV has a history of testing playerbase reception to awful practices (even for a gacha), and I found my limit for their nonsense.

It's the most dupe heavy gacha I've ever played, bar none; and they keep adding to it. They won't actually buff characters, just give them boosts at X number of dupes. They want to add a time limited pull currency when there's already four different currencies. They keep trying to force people to play unpopular game modes by nerfing current rewards.

It doesn't matter how often they backpedal (we're at, what, 3 within the last 24 hours?) if they keep showing they're testing what people will eat up.

I have played over 20 gachas within the last 10 years, probably a lot more games than that, spent money in many a one, but Morimens has been the most disappointing.

I imagine a timeline where Morimens is a real game, not held back by gacha garbage, and I feel sad at the wasted opportunity.

The core of the game is incredible, the audio-visual elements are fantastic even when compared to a real game, the narrative is one of those rare examples of Lovecraftian horror storytelling being done right. And it's all wasted because of an anti-consumer monetization model which keeps getting worse.

I'm done, and I wish I wasn't.

items.title: [负面] Its a shame what they are doing to this game, the ...
items.summary:
Its a shame what they are doing to this game, the new "Ethereal Cores" are basically ruining a perfectly normal system.
Listen, the game is fun, and I want the devs to succeed and get that bag as well, but this is not it.
it does seem they are taking feedback seriously though, so i hope that they can change this in the future.

items.title: [负面] Установил, запускаешь игру, выбираешь язык и ждёшь...
items.summary: Установил, запускаешь игру, выбираешь язык и ждёшь пока скачаются 2 ГБ языкового пакета, потом подтверждаешь пользовательское соглашение полностью на китайском языке, а после попадаешь в мир азиатской новеллы с элементами пошагового, тактического боя. Игра пестрит феминизмом как в SteamWorld Quest: Hand of Gilgamech, но только здесь 70% игрового времени приходится перелистывать тексты, 1% выбирать путь на аналоге глобальной карты и 29% участвовать в боях с карточной механикой и ограниченными очками атаки.

items.title: [正面] Most games wish they could write half as good, it ...
items.summary: Most games wish they could write half as good, it used to be held back by the translation but the community came together to fix most of the main campaign. The spectacle of how BIAV's writers sets up and executes finales is seriously memorable, Gameplay's pretty fun too, a lot of games these days tend to forget how to integrate the interactive elements of playing the game with storytelling so they could learn a thing or two from Morimens. At the end of the day it's still a mobile/gacha game so expect pop-ups asking you to spend, but I've been plenty fine without spending.

items.title:
[负面] 手游里面gameplay还行，少见。美术有一定风格化，不错。

好了，见过16张卡叠++++++++...
items.summary:
手游里面gameplay还行，少见。美术有一定风格化，不错。

好了，见过16张卡叠++++++++关键机制+++++++++的二游么，这个就是。而且还不算专武。按照一般游戏的重要性，专武也是要叠的，虽然没有16命这么核心。所以造一张卡C所有玩法需要16+16。32张。
这游戏一开始还是3叠4张完全体的。唯独骗氪这一块实装迅速。

你游以前还是有点值得玩的点的，16尸块光速落地属于是太自信了，不想想自己配不配
